query:
INSERT INTO equipment_constraints (name, capacity, unit, meal_capacity) VALUES 
('Oven', 2, 'ovens', 50),
('Blast Chiller', 5, 'trays', NULL)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
